metadata.title: Unified Master Astrology Predictive Framework Synthesis
metadata.scope: Detailed framework extraction and normalization across dasha systems, general predictive techniques, tertiary progressions, lunar returns, solar returns, secondary progressions, and solar arc directions.
metadata.objective: Verify delineation steps, normalize terminology, synthesize overlapping procedures, merge fields of the same type, and export a source-grounded master JSON.

retrieval: Fetched full article text for all seven URLs.
Ran targeted question extraction to verify calculation, delineation, weighting, synthesis, interpretation, and reporting details.
normalization_policy: Only statements supported by retrieved source text were included as explicit_source_grounded items.
Cross-source generalizations were marked as synthesized_normalization when they merge repeated structures across sources.
No external astrology doctrine was added beyond what appears in the source set.

field_merge_strategy.calculation: Merged formulas, cycles, constants, timing windows, location dependencies, and orb rules into one normalized calculation layer.
field_merge_strategy.delineation: Merged all reading workflows into a single multi-step pipeline, then attached method-specific emphases.
field_merge_strategy.weighting: Merged explicit priority rules, salience cues, orbs, angularity emphasis, convergence principles, and favorable/challenging combinations.
field_merge_strategy.synthesis: Merged all cross-technique integration instructions into one testimony/convergence framework.
field_merge_strategy.interpretation: Merged recurring interpretive targets: emotional themes, identity shifts, career, relationships, finance, timing, and psychological development.
field_merge_strategy.reporting: Merged all implied outputs into a standardized forecast/report format.

verification_scale.partial: Present but not stepwise or not fully parameterized.
verification_scale.absent: Not found in retrieved source text.

verified_delineation_elements: identify current major period
inspect sub-period ruler
differentiate favorable vs challenging combinations
contextualize by life domain such as career, relationship, finance
confirm with Western transits where available
rectify birth time using past event correlation when needed
start from natal chart as foundation
layer transits, progressions, returns, eclipses, profections, and planetary returns
read solar return independently and against natal chart
look for overlapping themes across methods
translate overlap into practical preparation, timing, consciousness, and choice
calculate progressed date using lunar-month-per-year rule
read tertiary Moon phase relative to progressed Sun
track house transitions
read aspects by progressed Moon, Mercury, Venus, Mars
assess progressed Ascendant
integrate with secondary progressions, solar arcs, and minor progressions
cast chart for exact Moon return
read return Ascendant
read Moon house placement
read aspects to return Moon
read angular planets and chart patterns
scan upcoming returns for intense months
integrate transits, progressed Moon, solar return, lunations, and other returns
cast chart for exact Sun return time and location
read Ascendant, Sun, Moon, aspects, house emphasis, angular planets
compare return chart with natal chart
derive yearly themes and timing windows
break down into monthly and seasonal checkpoints
calculate progressed chart by day-for-year rule
read progressed Moon sign and house
read progressed Sun sign and chapter shifts
read Mercury, Venus, Mars development
read angles and sign changes
check retrograde/direct status changes
track aspects within one degree
integrate with transits, solar returns, and eclipse cycles
calculate progressed Sun position
derive solar arc
apply arc to all planets and points
read directed-to-natal aspects
read midpoint contacts
compare with transits and secondary progressions
time strongest manifestation near exactitude

common_steps: Use exact birth data; several methods explicitly require precise birth time.
Preserve original birth time unless the method specifies a return chart or relocation context.
Calculate the method-specific reference chart or period first, then compare back to natal positions.
Use location-sensitive chart construction for return charts when the article specifies that the place of the return matters.
Apply precision standards because small deviations can shift timing by weeks, months, or years depending on method.

dasha_systems.core_formula_or_rule: Sequence is determined by birth Moon position; periods are fixed by system.
precision_notes: Birth time sensitivity can shift dasha periods by months or years.
Birth time rectification through past-event correlation is recommended.

timing_rules: Secondary progressions use one day after birth equals one year of life.
Progressed Moon moves about one degree per month and cycles in 27-28 years.
Progressed Sun moves about one degree per year and changes sign about every 30 years.
Eclipse effects unfold over roughly six months, strongest within about one month before and after the eclipse.
Annual profections advance the Ascendant by one sign per year in a 12-year cycle.
Saturn return occurs about every 29 years.
Mars return occurs about every 2 years.

tertiary_progressions.core_formula_or_rule: One lunar month after birth equals one year of life.
construction_steps: Add one sidereal lunar month per year of life to birth date.
Keep birth time constant while advancing date.
Use high-precision ephemerides because small variations compound over decades.

lunar_returns.core_formula_or_rule: Cast chart for exact moment transiting Moon returns to natal Moon degree and sign.
lunar_returns.cycle_length: about 27.3 days, with practical month-to-month variability around 26-29 days
mechanics: Moon moves about 12-15 degrees per day.
Influence lasts until next lunar return.

solar_returns.core_formula_or_rule: Cast chart for exact moment Sun returns to natal degree and minute.
mechanics: Return usually occurs within a day or two of birthday.
Chart is calculated for exact time and location of the return.
Mathematical precision of planetary positions, house cusps, and aspects is emphasized.

secondary_progressions.core_formula_or_rule: One day after birth equals one year of life.
construction_steps: Start with exact birth date, time, and location.
Add one day for each year lived.
Calculate progressed chart using progressed date with original birth time and location.
Compare progressed chart with natal chart.

movement_rates.progressed_moon: about 1 degree per month; full cycle 27-28 years
movement_rates.progressed_sun: about 1 degree per year; sign change about every 30 years

solar_arc_directions.core_formula_or_rule: One degree equals one year, using the progressed Sun arc for all chart points.
construction_steps: Calculate progressed Sun position for target date.
Subtract natal Sun from progressed Sun to derive solar arc.
Apply same arc to every planet, house cusp, node, and major asteroid.

orb_rules.major_aspects_general: 1 degree orb, about a 1-year window of influence
orb_rules.peak_manifestation: strongest within about 6 months of exactitude

unified_steps.name: Establish foundational chart or timing map
unified_steps.description: Start with the natal chart or natal timing basis, then construct the relevant predictive layer such as dasha periods, return chart, progression, or solar arc chart.

unified_steps.name: Identify the primary timing container
unified_steps.description: Determine the dominant annual, monthly, multi-year, or major-period frame: major dasha, solar return year, lunar return month, progressed Sun/Moon phase, or solar arc activation.

unified_steps.name: Read the primary focal indicators
unified_steps.description: Inspect the factors each method says carry the main message: Ascendant, Sun, Moon, house focus, period ruler, major aspects, or angular planets.

unified_steps.name: Map the active life domains
unified_steps.description: Translate house emphasis, planetary rulership, and thematic combinations into concrete domains such as career, relationships, finances, home, health, creativity, and inner development.

unified_steps.name: Check modifying factors
unified_steps.description: Assess sub-periods, exact aspects, angularity, conjunctions to angles, chart patterns, applying/separating status, retrograde changes, and relocation effects where relevant.

unified_steps.name: Determine timing intensity and sequence
unified_steps.description: Estimate when the theme is strongest using exact return windows, aspect exactitude, orb proximity, first-half versus second-half of year cues, or sub-period granularity.

unified_steps.name: Cross-check with other predictive layers
unified_steps.description: Look for reinforcement from transits, other progression systems, eclipses, profections, returns, or another timing method named in the articles.

unified_steps.name: Convert into practical forecast guidance
unified_steps.description: Frame the result as opportunities, challenges, preparation strategies, decision timing, emotional weather, or developmental lessons.

dasha_systems: Identify current major period and sub-period.
Interpret each period by planetary themes and relevant life domain.
Refine with favorable or difficult period combinations.
Confirm using transits when integrating with Western methods.
predictive_techniques_general: Read multiple methods together rather than in isolation.
Use convergence to build the final narrative.
tertiary_progressions: Prioritize tertiary Moon phases, house changes, and Moon-related emotional development.
Read progressed Mercury, Venus, Mars, and Ascendant for subtle psychological shifts.
Interpret as unconscious or subliminal patterning more than dramatic event triggers.
lunar_returns: Then read aspects to the return Moon.
Then read angular planets and patterns for monthly tone.
solar_returns: Read Ascendant, Sun placement, Moon position, aspects, house emphasis, angular planets.
Compare with natal chart for annual activation.
Translate to yearly themes and likely timing through the year.
secondary_progressions: Read progressed Moon for emotional focus and short-cycle development.
Read progressed Sun for major life chapter and identity evolution.
Read personal planets, angles, and retrograde shifts for nuanced development.
Track major progressed aspects and progressed lunations.
solar_arc_directions: Read directed planet to natal point aspects.
Give special attention to Sun, Moon, Midheaven, Ascendant, Descendant, and natal chart rulers.
Include midpoint activations for advanced forecasting.

normalized_priority_rules: Convergence across multiple methods increases confidence; the sources call these testimonies or multiple witnesses.
Exact aspects carry more weight than loose ones.
Angular placements or planets on angles are emphasized in return work.
Primary timing rulers or focal indicators outrank secondary modifiers within each method.
Benefic or harmonious combinations are treated as smoother or more supportive; difficult combinations are treated as more challenging or effortful.
Major life chapter indicators receive more interpretive weight than subtle background indicators.

dasha_systems: Benefic pairings such as Jupiter-Venus and Venus-Mercury are described as highly harmonious.
Difficult combinations such as Saturn-Mars or Mars-Saturn are described as intense/challenging.
predictive_techniques_general: Confidence rises when several methods point to the same topic.
Solar return is presented as one of the most reliable annual methods.
Outer planet transits describe longer, major chapters; inner planet transits color shorter intervals.
tertiary_progressions: Tighter orbs are recommended because the technique is subtle.
Major aspects use 1-2 degrees; minor aspects use 30 minutes to 1 degree.
Applying versus separating aspects carry different weight.
Progressed Moon and Ascendant are presented as especially significant.
lunar_returns: Ascendant, Moon house, Moon aspects, angular placements, and distinctive patterns are prioritized.
Angular Moon placements are described as more intense.
Nearby eclipses and outer-planet activations increase monthly significance.
solar_returns: Moon shows emotional and domestic themes.
Angular planets represent the most significant influences and events.
Concentrations by house emphasize those life areas.
secondary_progressions: Progressed Moon is described as perhaps the most noticeable progression.
Progressed Sun marks major decades-long chapters.
Progressed New and Full Moons are among the most important cycles.
Aspects within one degree are highlighted.
solar_arc_directions: Major aspects usually use 1 degree or less.
Conjunctions/oppositions receive the largest allowed orb, then squares/trines, then sextiles/minor aspects.
Aspects to chart rulers and angles are prioritized.

synthesis.core_principle: Do not rely on one method in isolation; build a coherent forecast from overlapping indicators.
normalized_synthesis_steps: Construct each method's forecast independently enough to preserve its own logic.
Extract repeating themes such as relationship change, professional growth, emotional restructuring, or spiritual development.
Rank themes higher when they appear in multiple methods or through multiple indicators within one method.
Use one method to answer 'what/where' and another to refine 'when/how intensely'.
Differentiate internal development signals from external triggers where the source set explicitly does so.
Resolve tension by stating both supportive and difficult signatures rather than forcing a single polarity.
Turn synthesis into forecast windows and practical choices.

explicit_cross_method_roles.transits: External triggers and current sky activation.
explicit_cross_method_roles.secondary_progressions: Internal development and evolving psychological landscape.
explicit_cross_method_roles.lunar_returns: Monthly emotional weather and short-cycle focus.
explicit_cross_method_roles.solar_arc_directions: Definitive turning points and internal timing precision.
explicit_cross_method_roles.dasha_systems: Planetary period timing and event windows, especially when combined with transits.

testimony_logic.definition: Multiple independent indicators pointing to the same life theme.
examples_from_sources: A major progression plus a significant transit.
Solar arc aspect coinciding with relevant transit.
7th-house profection plus relationship-linked progressions and return emphasis.
Dasha period confirmed by a Western transit.

interpretive_modes.developmental: Many techniques are framed as revealing growth cycles rather than fixed fate.
interpretive_modes.timing_oriented: Most techniques are used to identify when a theme is likely to peak or unfold.
interpretive_modes.psychological: Progressions and lunar methods especially emphasize inner landscape and emotional evolution.
interpretive_modes.practical: Articles frequently translate symbols into action areas such as career moves, relationships, investment decisions, therapy, or self-care.

explicit_interpretive_patterns: Return charts describe the tone of a bounded period: month or year.
Progressions describe evolving inner development and life chapters.
Solar arcs describe turning points and precise activation periods.
Dashas describe larger planetary conditions, with sub-periods refining outcomes.
General predictive technique guidance emphasizes empowerment, preparation, and conscious response rather than deterministic fate.

normalized_output_schema.timeframe_summary: State the relevant period: annual, monthly, multi-year, or exact activation window.
normalized_output_schema.dominant_themes: List the main topics repeated across methods.
normalized_output_schema.active_indicators: Name the focal factors: Ascendant, Sun, Moon, period ruler, exact aspects, angular planets, etc.
normalized_output_schema.challenging_factors: Stressors, hard aspects, difficult combinations, or caution zones.
normalized_output_schema.timing_windows: When the effect is likely strongest: exactitude, first part of year, eclipse season, sub-period, next lunar return, etc.
normalized_output_schema.practical_guidance: Preparation, launch timing, reflection, journaling, therapy/inner work, relationship handling, or career strategy.
normalized_output_schema.confidence_basis: Explain which themes were repeated by multiple testimonies.

reporting_patterns_explicit_in_sources: Month-by-month or year-ahead style forecasting is repeatedly implied.
Reports should identify opportunities, challenges, and optimal timing.
Forecasting should support awareness, preparation, and empowerment rather than anxiety.
Some methods suggest follow-up practices such as journaling, meditation, ritual, or periodic check-ins.

method_profiles.integration_role: Used with Western transits for confirmation.
Defines the convergence/testimony logic for the whole master framework.
Best used with secondary progressions, solar arcs, and transits.

explicit_weighting: eclipses and outer planets amplify significance
method_profiles.integration_role: Monthly layer under annual themes and transits.
Annual framework that can be broken down by months/seasons and compared against natal chart.
Internal development layer used with transits and solar returns.
Pairs with transits for manifestation and with secondary progressions for gradual-vs-definitive distinction.

notes: The articles are instructional/marketing hybrids and do not provide fully formal mathematical derivations for every system.
Where a method lacks a complete algorithm in the source, the master JSON preserves only the explicit operational rule stated in the article.
Weighting is primarily qualitative across the source set; no numeric scoring model is supplied by the articles.
